---
title: "Project Proposal"
subtitle: "INF2167 - R for Data Science"
author: "Ziad Harmanani"
format: pdf
mainfont: "Times New Roman"
fontsize: "12pt"
bibliography: references.bib
execute: 
  warning: false
---

1.  Introduction
2.  Research Question(s) & Hypotheses
3.  Dataset & Methods
4.  Exploratory Data Analysis

#### Workspace setup ####
## Load packages ##

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
raw <- read_csv("data/raw.csv")
```

```{r}
summary(raw)
```
